subject: Re: FloodClaims Phase 4 — Integration Complete. Will test now.
body:
Bull — Got your Phase 4 completion message. Great work! Heres my action plan:

1. Pull latest from GitHub right now
2. Verify claim_detail.html v2 renders correctly
3. Test the full customer upload flow (generate-link → phone upload → batch analyze)
4. Check Railway auto-deployment

I also noticed the USB Repair Agent and FloodClaims Photo-to-Claim projects are still outstanding from earlier messages. The USB Repair agent code is complete at liberty-agent-puppy/ and just needs hardware testing.

Starting the verification now.

— OWL
